description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has multiple jobs for different environments: macos monterey 12, ros 2 foxy on ubuntu, ubuntu 20.04 focal, and ubuntu 20.04 focal with apt. Each job checks out the repository, performs environment-specific setup and sanitization, and then runs build and test scripts.
